label: PertaminaGLD Server Bridge
info: Decodes gld/gateway/uplink (encrypted GLDRecords) and republishes to gld/server/decoded, gld/server/alarm, gld/gateway/error. See memory/nodered_integration.md and memory/pertamina_gld_protocol.md. Run via: node-red -s ./settings.js -f flows/pertamina-gld-server.flow.json

name: decode GLDRecord(s)
route by ok/alarm
